reviews.review_msg: I love this guy. He is extremely approachable to the point where I want him to be my legal guardian, he is clear about his expectations, and his exams and homework are beyond fair. I can't even imagine not loving this guy, you can ask him the stupidest question and he will be gleeful to help you. Genuinely cares so much for his students. Groovy?
Field 1 was confusing at best, numerous times I was lost. The course needs far better delivery
